storylets.title: {=floor_aftermath_notice_casualties_title}Three names added
storylets.setup: {=floor_aftermath_notice_casualties_setup}Three names added to the rolls. A sergeant cleans his sword with a torn rag, unhurried. No one is told who they were. By morning the rolls are rewritten fair.

storylets.title: {=floor_aftermath_notice_village_burned_title}A village burns behind
storylets.setup: {=floor_aftermath_notice_village_burned_setup}A village burns behind us. Orders said to move on. The smoke climbs wrong, thick and black where thatch should be thin and gray. No one in the column looks back.

storylets.title: {=floor_aftermath_notice_prisoners_marched_title}A column of prisoners
storylets.setup: {=floor_aftermath_notice_prisoners_marched_setup}A column of prisoners marches behind the army, roped at the wrists. Some limp, most stare at their feet. A guard whistles something tuneless and no one joins in.

storylets.title: {=floor_aftermath_notice_wounded_cart_title}The wounded cart
storylets.setup: {=floor_aftermath_notice_wounded_cart_setup}The wounded cart rolls slow. Some will not make the next town. A surgeon's boy changes bandages as the wheels creak, and the wheels creak the same whether a man breathes or not.

options.tooltip: {=floor_aftermath_notice_wounded_cart_tt}Nothing to do for them. No effect.

storylets.title: {=floor_aftermath_notice_captured_standard_title}A captured standard
storylets.setup: {=floor_aftermath_notice_captured_standard_setup}A captured standard rides with us. The men are quieter than last week. No one has said it was their friend under that banner, but two sergeants pass it without looking and without speaking.
